Metadata.title: Aurevia Travel
Metadata.description: Premium international travel booking from Vienna for flights, stays, cars, transfers, tours, and visa support.

Footer.trustCopy: Premium travel planning, booking coordination, and document support from Vienna for globally mobile clients.
Footer.trustMicrocopy: The platform foundation is designed for clear itineraries, secure data handling, and premium service continuity.

CookieConsent.label: Cookie consent
CookieConsent.title: Privacy choices for cookies
CookieConsent.description: Aurevia Travel uses necessary cookies for secure sessions and may use optional analytics or marketing cookies only after your choice. You can review or change these settings later in your privacy center.
CookieConsent.customizeTitle: Choose which optional cookies to allow

necessary.title: Necessary
necessary.body: Required for secure sessions, core navigation, and essential platform behavior.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.body: Helps us understand product performance and improve the travel experience over time.

marketing.title: Marketing
marketing.body: Supports campaign measurement and future tailored outreach where consent is available.

HomeSeo.title: Aurevia Travel | Premium travel planning from Vienna
HomeSeo.description: Book flights, hotels, cars, transfers, tours, and visa support through a premium multilingual travel platform built in Vienna for global customers.
HomeSeo.ogTitle: Aurevia Travel | Premium travel planning from Vienna
HomeSeo.ogDescription: A multilingual, premium travel platform for flights, stays, cars, transfers, tours, and visa support.

hero.title: Premium journeys, coordinated with European care.
hero.lead: Aurevia Travel helps international travelers move from planning to booking across flights, stays, cars, transfers, tours, and visa support with clarity, discretion, and dependable follow-through.
hero.assurance: Designed for global customers, grounded in Vienna, and structured for privacy-aware, multi-currency travel planning.

visual.routeBody: One premium planning surface for flights, stays, transfers, and onward experiences.
visual.trustBody: Server-side flows, protected customer areas, and provider-agnostic booking architecture keep the platform calm behind the scenes.
visual.globalBody: Launch architecture includes English and German today, with room for more locales, supplier integrations, and customer journeys as we scale.

destinations.title: Signature places for smart international itineraries
destinations.lead: Use featured inspiration as a starting point for city breaks, premium stopovers, and longer multi-service journeys.

vienna.title: Vienna
vienna.summary: Elegant city breaks, premium rail and air access, and cultural stays with a refined Central European feel.

dubai.title: Dubai
dubai.summary: High-touch stopovers, private transfers, and luxury urban stays designed for effortless onward travel.

london.title: London
london.summary: International business and leisure itineraries with polished hotel choices, transfers, and activity pairings.

inspiration.title: Premium offers and travel inspiration
inspiration.lead: Editorial highlights let us surface the kinds of trips Aurevia will package beautifully as the booking flows expand.

signature.title: Signature Vienna arrivals
signature.summary: Elegant air arrivals, premium transfers, and cultural stays designed as one polished entry into Europe.

privatePairs.title: Private stay pairings
privatePairs.summary: Pair boutique hotels with airport transfers and city experiences for cleaner, calmer journeys.

visaReady.title: Visa-ready travel planning
visaReady.summary: Keep itinerary planning and document support close together when a trip needs both.

why.title: Built to feel calm, precise, and internationally credible
why.lead: Aurevia Travel is being shaped for travelers who want more than a generic booking engine. They need coordination, trust, and thoughtful service design.

coordination.title: Coordinated journeys
coordination.body: Search, booking, documents, and after-booking communication are structured to feel connected rather than fragmented.

globalPerspective.title: Global perspective
globalPerspective.body: The platform starts in Vienna with global customers in mind, including multi-currency support and future supplier flexibility.

trust.title: Trust by design
trust.body: Protected data flows, audit-friendly foundations, and server-side authorization patterns support a reliable premium service.

metrics.currencyBody: EUR, USD, GBP, AED, and NGN are already built into the platform foundation.
metrics.vatBody: Austrian VAT handling is part of the financial model from day one.
metrics.privacyBody: GDPR-aware patterns guide consent, document handling, and customer account architecture.

services.title: Six core services, one premium customer journey
services.lead: Each service area is modular today so the booking experience can grow without losing consistency tomorrow.

flights.title: Flights
flights.description: Search and route international air itineraries.
flights.body: Build direct or connecting journeys with premium presentation and room for supplier expansion.

hotels.title: Hotels and stays
hotels.description: Plan polished lodging experiences across global destinations.
hotels.body: Create premium stay journeys with room logic, rate design, and itinerary context.

cars.title: Car rental
cars.description: Coordinate flexible vehicle needs for business or leisure travel.
cars.body: Prepare self-drive journeys with date validation, search routing, and multi-currency presentation.

transfers.title: Airport transfers
transfers.description: Move travelers cleanly between airports, hotels, and city points.
transfers.body: Support premium point-to-point journeys with reliable structure and future supplier orchestration.

tours.title: Tours and activities
tours.description: Add curated experiences to larger itineraries.
tours.body: Tie destination experiences into the same customer journey without breaking design consistency.

visa.title: Visa support
visa.description: Keep itinerary planning close to document-aware travel assistance.
visa.body: Prepare travelers for later upload, review, and compliance-aware application flows.

proof.title: A credible foundation for international travel service
proof.lead: This homepage introduces the voice, structure, and reassurance layer customers expect before they share plans or documents.

metrics.regionsBody: Positioned from Europe for travelers moving across business, leisure, family, and documentation needs.
metrics.servicesBody: Flights, stays, cars, transfers, tours, and visa assistance sit within the same structured experience.
metrics.supportBody: Designed for responsive communication, secure handling, and future operational follow-through.

maria.quote: We needed flights, hotel coordination, and transfer planning to feel seamless. Aurevia's direction feels built for exactly that kind of premium support.
maria.name: Maria K.

samuel.quote: The strongest signal here is trust. The experience already feels international, structured, and calm enough for high-value travel planning.
samuel.name: Samuel T.

amina.quote: Keeping visa assistance close to itinerary planning is genuinely useful. That combination matters when travel is time-sensitive.
amina.name: Amina O.

newsletter.title: Join the list for launch updates and curated travel notes
newsletter.lead: Receive refined destination inspiration, new service launches, and early access to future itinerary features.

Newsletter.disclaimer: We will only use this email for launch updates and curated travel communications. Full consent and preference controls come in later phases.
Newsletter.followUp: You are on the list. Future phases will connect this form to persistent lead capture and preference management.
Newsletter.successDescription: We will keep {email} in mind for launch updates.

SearchTabs.title: Search across core travel services
SearchTabs.description: Start with the service you need today. Each form is compact, validated, and ready to route into its dedicated Aurevia flow.

descriptions.flights: Start with air routing for business, leisure, or multi-stop travel planning.
descriptions.hotels: Search destination stays with a polished, itinerary-aware booking surface.
descriptions.cars: Plan flexible self-drive journeys with clean date validation and location routing.
descriptions.transfers: Coordinate private or scheduled point-to-point movement with clear pickup details.
descriptions.tours: Add destination experiences without losing the structure of the wider journey.
descriptions.visa: Begin with travel readiness and document-aware planning support.

validation.returnAfterDeparture: Return date must be on or after the departure date.

visa.nationalityHint: Choose the passport nationality for this visa service enquiry.
visa.destinationCountryHint: Visa support is currently available for selected destinations in this phase.

BookingFlows.subtitle: Search summary
BookingFlows.searchSummaryTitle: We captured the details below so the next flow can build on them.

flights.title: Flight planning flow
flights.description: This next-step page is ready to become the premium Aurevia flights search and quote flow.
flights.detailBody: Upcoming phases will connect validated search criteria to mock providers, pricing snapshots, itinerary selection, and secure checkout scaffolding.

hotels.title: Stay planning flow
hotels.description: This next-step page is ready to become Aurevia's premium lodging search and shortlist flow.
hotels.detailBody: Upcoming phases will introduce destination-based inventory, room logic, rate snapshots, and hotel booking journeys with preserved historical pricing.

cars.title: Car rental planning flow
cars.description: This next-step page is ready to become Aurevia's premium car hire search and booking flow.
cars.detailBody: Upcoming phases will connect date-safe search criteria to mock providers, availability results, vehicle detail snapshots, and secure reservation handling.

transfers.title: Transfer planning flow
transfers.description: This next-step page is ready to become Aurevia's airport and city transfer booking flow.
transfers.detailBody: Upcoming phases will add route summaries, passenger-aware vehicle options, service windows, and protected booking continuation.

tours.title: Experience planning flow
tours.description: This next-step page is ready to become Aurevia's curated tours and activities discovery flow.
tours.detailBody: Upcoming phases will connect destination-led search input to mock inventory, experience detail snapshots, scheduling, and bundled itinerary add-ons.

visa.title: Visa assistance flow
visa.description: This next-step page is ready to become Aurevia's visa readiness and document guidance flow.
visa.detailBody: Upcoming phases will add nationality-aware requirements, secure document uploads, application tracking, and private customer follow-up surfaces.

validation.destinationMustDiffer: Origin and destination must be different.
validation.returnAfterDeparture: Return date must be on or after the departure date.
validation.returnDateRequired: Return date is required for round-trip searches.
validation.totalPassengersRange: Choose between 1 and 9 travelers in total.

resultsPage.title: Search premium air itineraries with a clearer review flow.
resultsPage.lead: Compare mock flight offers with reusable supplier-neutral structure, multi-currency totals, and enough trip detail to move confidently into booking review.

results.introBody: Enter an origin, destination, travel dates, and passenger mix to review normalized Aurevia flight offers.
results.errorBody: Please retry the flight search. If the issue continues, the support team can investigate.
results.emptyTitle: Run a search to view offers
results.emptyBody: Aurevia will show normalized flight options here once a valid search is submitted.
results.filteredEmptyBody: Try widening the price range, reducing filter constraints, or changing the route dates.
results.baggagePlaceholder: Baggage details will remain attached to the offer snapshot when you continue.

detailsPage.lead: Inspect the itinerary snapshot, fare conditions, and baggage summary before moving into the secure booking step.
detailsPage.notFoundBody: This flight offer is no longer available in cache. Please run a fresh search.

booking.notFoundBody: This offer is no longer available in cache. Please return to search and choose another itinerary.
booking.signInBody: Pending flight bookings are stored against a protected customer account so the itinerary, payment, and later documents remain tied to the right traveler.
booking.detailsLead: Enter the traveler and contact details that should stay attached to this itinerary before payment is created in a later step.
booking.reviewLead: Confirm the passenger list, contact details, and preserved flight snapshot before the pending booking is stored.
booking.specialRequestsPlaceholder: Meal notes, seating preferences, accessibility support, or celebration details.
booking.saveTravelerProfilesLabel: Save these travelers to my profile for faster future bookings.
booking.specialRequestsEmpty: No special requests were added for this booking.
booking.pendingPaymentNotice: This booking will be stored with pending payment status so checkout can confirm the preserved itinerary later.
booking.submitErrorBody: Please review the flight details and try again.
booking.submitSuccessDescription: Reference {reference} is ready for the next payment step.

validation.contactPhoneInvalid: Enter at least 6 characters or leave the field empty.
validation.dateOfBirthInvalid: Enter a valid date of birth.
validation.specialRequestsTooLong: Special requests must be 1000 characters or fewer.

confirmation.title: Your itinerary is stored for the next payment step
confirmation.lead: The selected flight snapshot is now attached to your booking reference and remains available for secure checkout later.
confirmation.notFoundBody: This booking could not be found in your account.
confirmation.descriptionFallback: Your itinerary snapshot is stored and ready for the next payment phase.
confirmation.pendingBody: This booking is still waiting for payment, so you can move directly into secure checkout when you are ready.

results.heroTitle: Curated activities, ready for premium itinerary planning.
results.heroBody: Search destination experiences with refined presentation, flexible filters, and booking-ready snapshots that can later connect into wider Aurevia journeys.
results.emptySearchBody: Choose a destination and date to see Aurevia's curated mock tours and activities.
results.loadingBody: We are checking the mock experience suite and preparing normalized offers, availability windows, and filter-ready results.
results.errorBody: Please retry the activity search. If the issue continues, the support team can investigate.
results.emptyResultsBody: Try widening the budget, changing the category, or removing a private-only requirement to surface more options.

detail.leadPriceBody: Starting price per adult for the selected date.
detail.availabilityBody: Choose the departure window that best fits the wider itinerary. Availability remains mock-driven in this phase but is preserved when a pending booking is created.
detail.reviewsBody: A later phase can connect a fuller review layer here. For now, this shell keeps the page ready for trust content without faking live supplier review data.

booking.title: Create a pending activity booking
booking.signInBody: Pending activity bookings are stored against a protected customer account so the selected slot, pricing snapshot, and later payment flow stay tied to the right owner.
booking.participantsBody: Select the preferred slot, confirm participant counts, and add the lead traveler details that should stay attached to this pending booking.
booking.addOnsBody: Enhance the activity with optional extras where the supplier snapshot supports them.
booking.contactBody: We will use these details for the pending booking, supplier coordination, and later payment communication.
booking.specialRequestsPlaceholder: Accessibility notes, celebration context, or coordination details.
booking.reviewBody: Confirm the selected slot, participant mix, add-ons, and the current activity snapshot before the pending payment record is created.
booking.vatNotice: This structure preserves a booking-time tax snapshot. Final legal and tax wording still requires review before production launch.
booking.successDescription: Reference {reference} is ready for the next payment phase.

validation.leadTravelerFirstNameRequired: Enter the lead traveler's first name.
validation.leadTravelerLastNameRequired: Enter the lead traveler's last name.
validation.slotRequired: Please choose an available time slot.
validation.slotUnavailable: The selected slot is no longer available for this participant count.
validation.specialRequestsTooLong: Special requests must be 1000 characters or less.

confirmation.title: Your activity is stored for the next payment step
confirmation.body: Booking reference {reference} is now stored as a pending payment record with the selected slot and activity snapshot preserved.
confirmation.pendingBody: A later payment phase will connect this booking to Stripe checkout and post-payment confirmation handling.
confirmation.noSpecialRequests: No special requests were stored for this booking.
confirmation.noAddOns: No add-ons were selected for this booking.

validation.ageRange: Driver age must be between 21 and 80.

results.heroTitle: Premium self-drive options with clear booking structure.
results.heroBody: Search provider-agnostic mock rental inventory across airport and city pickups with multi-currency totals, terms snapshots, and enough detail to move confidently into booking review.
results.emptySearchBody: Enter locations, dates, times, and driver age to review Aurevia's current mock rental inventory.
results.loadingBody: We are checking the mobility inventory and preparing normalized vehicle offers, taxes, and filter-ready results.
results.errorBody: Please retry the search. If the issue continues, the support team can investigate.
results.emptyResultsBody: Try widening the budget, reducing the seat requirement, or removing one of the category filters.

detail.leadPriceBody: Current price for the selected rental window.
detail.actionBody: The next step stores the pending booking against a protected customer account so payment and later documents stay tied to the right traveler.

booking.title: Create a pending car booking
booking.signInBody: Pending bookings are stored against a protected customer account so the rental review, payment, and later invoices remain tied to the right owner.
booking.driverBody: Enter the primary driver exactly as they should appear on the booking and later payment record.
booking.contactBody: We will use these details for the pending booking, supplier coordination, and later payment communication.
booking.specialRequestsPlaceholder: Arrival notes, child seat requests, or premium handling details.
booking.reviewBody: Confirm the driver details, contact information, and the current rental snapshot before the pending payment record is created.
booking.vatNotice: This structure preserves a booking-time tax snapshot. Final legal and tax wording still requires review before production launch.
booking.successDescription: Reference {reference} is ready for the next payment phase.

validation.specialRequestsTooLong: Special requests must be 1000 characters or less.

confirmation.title: Your car booking is stored for the next payment step
confirmation.body: Booking reference {reference} is now stored as a pending payment record with the rental snapshot preserved.
confirmation.pendingBody: A later payment phase will connect this booking to Stripe checkout and post-payment confirmation handling.

validation.flightNumberRequired: Enter the flight number for airport transfers.

results.heroTitle: Premium ground moves with cleaner arrival and departure planning.
results.heroBody: Search provider-agnostic mock transfer inventory for airport arrivals, hotel departures, and premium city routing with multi-currency totals and booking-ready summaries.
results.emptySearchBody: Choose the route mode, service time, passenger count, and location details to review Aurevia's current transfer inventory.
results.loadingBody: We are checking the mobility inventory and preparing normalized transfer offers, taxes, and filter-ready results.
results.errorBody: Please retry the search. If the issue continues, the support team can investigate.
results.emptyResultsBody: Try widening the budget, removing a class filter, or reducing the capacity requirement.

detail.leadPriceBody: Current price for the selected service window.
detail.actionBody: The next step stores the pending transfer booking against a protected customer account so payment and later updates remain tied to the right traveler.

booking.title: Create a pending transfer booking
booking.signInBody: Pending bookings are stored against a protected customer account so the transfer review, payment, and later invoices remain tied to the right owner.
booking.passengerBody: Enter the primary traveler details that should stay attached to this pending transfer booking.
booking.contactBody: We will use these details for the pending booking, supplier coordination, and later payment communication.
booking.specialRequestsPlaceholder: Arrival signage notes, child seats, or concierge coordination details.
booking.reviewBody: Confirm the lead traveler, flight reference where relevant, and the current transfer snapshot before the pending payment record is created.
booking.vatNotice: This structure preserves a booking-time tax snapshot. Final legal and tax wording still requires review before production launch.
booking.successDescription: Reference {reference} is ready for the next payment phase.

validation.leadPassengerFirstNameRequired: Enter the lead passenger's first name.
validation.leadPassengerLastNameRequired: Enter the lead passenger's last name.
validation.specialRequestsTooLong: Special requests must be 1000 characters or less.

confirmation.title: Your transfer booking is stored for the next payment step
confirmation.body: Booking reference {reference} is now stored as a pending payment record with the transfer snapshot preserved.
confirmation.pendingBody: A later payment phase will connect this booking to Stripe checkout and post-payment confirmation handling.

validation.guestsAtLeastRooms: Guests must be at least the room count.
validation.starRange: Choose a rating between 1 and 5 stars.

results.heroTitle: Premium stays, ready for trusted booking review.
results.heroBody: Search curated mock inventory across city hotels, boutique addresses, resorts, and longer-stay options with multi-currency pricing, cancellation clarity, and premium presentation from the first click.
results.emptySearchBody: Enter a destination, dates, guest count, and room count to see Aurevia's premium mock hotel inventory.
results.loadingBody: We are checking the mock stays suite and preparing normalized room offers, pricing snapshots, and filter-ready results.
results.errorBody: Please retry the stay search. If the issue continues, the support team can investigate.
results.emptyResultsBody: Try widening the budget, removing an amenity filter, or reducing the required flexibility to see more options.

detail.leadPriceBody: Starting price for the current stay window.
detail.mapBody: A premium map layer will connect here later. Coordinates: {latitude}, {longitude}.
detail.reviewsBody: A structured reviews surface will be connected in a later phase. For now this shell keeps the detail layout ready for future trust content.

booking.title: Create a pending hotel booking
booking.signInBody: Pending bookings are stored against a protected customer account so the stay review, payment, and later invoices remain tied to the right owner.
booking.guestsBody: Enter the names for all {count} guests attached to this stay request.
booking.contactBody: We will use these details for the pending booking, supplier follow-up, and future payment communication.
booking.specialRequestsPlaceholder: Arrival notes, bedding preferences, or concierge requests.
booking.reviewBody: Confirm the guest list, contact details, and the current room-rate snapshot before creating the pending payment record.
booking.vatNotice: This structure preserves a booking-time tax snapshot. Final legal and tax wording still requires review before production launch.
booking.successDescription: Reference {reference} is ready for the next payment phase.

validation.guestCountMismatch: Guest details do not match the selected room.
validation.specialRequestsTooLong: Special requests must be 1000 characters or less.

confirmation.title: Your stay is reserved for the next payment step
confirmation.body: Booking reference {reference} is now stored as a pending payment record with the room-rate snapshot preserved.
confirmation.pendingBody: A later payment phase will connect this booking to Stripe checkout and post-payment confirmation handling.

checkout.title: Review your pending booking before payment
checkout.body: Stripe Checkout is used here so payment authentication, hosted payment collection, and later webhook confirmation stay server-driven and easier to reconcile across booking types.
checkout.secureCopy: Payment is launched from a protected server route. Final invoice wording and tax treatment still require accountant and legal validation before production launch.
checkout.taxEmpty: No separate tax line was stored for this booking snapshot.
checkout.taxReviewNotice: The current implementation uses the Austrian baseline configuration for tax storage ({countryCode}) and still requires accountant review before go-live.

success.title: Payment confirmed and booking finalized
success.body: Booking reference {reference} is now confirmed. Invoice generation and email delivery are tied to the same payment lifecycle.
success.processingBody: The payment provider returned successfully, but the final confirmation is still being synchronized. Please refresh shortly if this state does not update.

cancel.title: Your payment session was cancelled
cancel.body: The booking is still stored as pending payment, so you can return to checkout when you are ready.

Auth.title: Secure access
Auth.description: Sign in, create a customer account, or request a secure email link.
Auth.emailHint: We will send a secure sign-in link using Supabase Auth.
Auth.passwordLoginErrorDescription: Check your email and password, then try again.
Auth.registrationSuccessDescription: Your Aurevia customer account is ready.
Auth.registrationCheckInboxDescription: A confirmation link was sent to {email}.
Auth.registrationErrorDescription: Please review your details and try again.
Auth.notCustomerError: Use the admin portal for staff accounts.
Auth.emailSuccessDescription: A secure sign-in link was sent to {email}.

validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters.

shell.title: Aurevia account for {name}
shell.body: Manage your profile, saved travelers, bookings, payments, invoices, and visa applications from one protected customer surface with server-side ownership checks.
shell.securityNotice: This dashboard is tied to your Aurevia account and only loads records owned by the signed-in customer.
shell.supportBody: If a booking, invoice, or visa submission needs concierge support, the Aurevia operations team can step in from protected server-side workflows.

overview.recentBookingsBody: Track the latest itinerary records, payment state, and next actions without leaving the account overview.
overview.recentBookingsEmpty: No bookings have been created on this account yet.
overview.recentInvoicesBody: Invoices are generated after successful payment confirmation and remain linked to the original booking snapshot.
overview.invoiceWithoutBooking: Invoice linked to a historical booking record
overview.recentVisaBody: Review the latest visa-service submissions, upload progress, and document status from one place.
overview.recentVisaEmpty: No visa applications have been started yet.

bookings.title: Booking history
bookings.body: Review historical booking snapshots, payment progress, invoice links, and refund indicators across all Aurevia service types.
bookings.emptyBody: Try widening the search, clearing the filters, or create a new itinerary from the booking modules.
bookings.descriptionFallback: Immutable booking details are available inside the booking record.

bookingDetail.body: This view preserves the immutable booking snapshot captured at confirmation time, along with payment and invoice context owned by the signed-in customer.
bookingDetail.descriptionFallback: No additional customer-facing description was stored for this item.
bookingDetail.travelersEmpty: No traveler records were attached to this booking.
bookingDetail.billingEmpty: No billing address snapshot was stored on this booking.
bookingDetail.refundsEmpty: No refunds are attached to this booking.

profile.title: Profile and settings
profile.body: Keep your Aurevia profile, communication preferences, locale, currency, and billing details ready for future bookings and invoices.
profile.personalBody: These fields support faster booking review, clearer traveler records, and better post-booking service communication.
profile.emailHint: Your sign-in email is managed through Supabase Auth and is displayed here for reference.
profile.contactBody: Add the best phone number and billing contact details to reduce checkout friction across future bookings.
profile.preferencesBody: These preferences shape future booking defaults and localized customer communication.
profile.marketingHint: This toggle stores your high-level marketing preference. Final campaign preference management can expand in a later phase.
profile.billingBody: Optional billing details are stored for future invoice alignment and smoother checkout prefill.
profile.saveSuccessDescription: Your account settings were saved successfully.
profile.saveErrorDescription: Please retry the update. If the issue continues, support can investigate.
profile.securityBody: Use this entry point when you want to end the current session and return to the public Aurevia experience.
profile.signOutErrorDescription: Please try again in a moment.

validation.firstNameTooLong: First name must be 80 characters or less.
validation.lastNameTooLong: Last name must be 80 characters or less.

travelers.title: Saved travelers
travelers.body: Store traveler profiles, passenger metadata, and primary document references so future bookings can start from trusted customer-owned records.
travelers.emptyBody: Create traveler records here to speed up future booking flows and keep repeat passenger details organized.
travelers.deleteSuccessDescription: The traveler profile was removed from your saved list.
travelers.documentBody: Store light document metadata only. Private file uploads remain in dedicated flows such as visa processing.
travelers.primaryTravelerHint: Mark one saved traveler as the default starting point for future booking flows.
travelers.updatedDescription: The traveler profile was updated successfully.
travelers.createdDescription: The traveler profile was created successfully.

validation.documentLast4Invalid: Enter up to 4 letters or numbers.
validation.documentTypeRequired: Choose a document type before saving document metadata.
validation.expiresAfterIssued: Document expiry must be after the issue date.
validation.firstNameTooLong: First name must be 80 characters or less.
validation.lastNameTooLong: Last name must be 80 characters or less.
validation.notesTooLong: Special assistance notes must be 500 characters or less.

payments.title: Payments and invoices
payments.body: Track captured payments, refund state, and invoice availability across confirmed Aurevia bookings.
payments.paymentsEmpty: No payments have been recorded on this account yet.

visa.title: Visa applications
visa.body: Review destination-based visa-service submissions, status progression, and document readiness without exposing private upload URLs directly.
visa.emptyBody: Start a visa service from the public flow when you need requirements guidance, document collection, and tracked submission status.

visaDetail.body: This detail view keeps the visa-service submission readable for the signed-in customer while preserving private document access through signed server routes.
visaDetail.documentsEmpty: No private documents have been uploaded yet.
visaDetail.privacyBody: Uploads remain private by default and are only opened through short-lived signed access prepared on the server for the signed-in owner.
visaDetail.privacyNote: This workflow supports a visa service provider relationship and does not represent government legal advice or direct government filing.

privacy.title: Privacy and data controls
privacy.body: Manage cookie choices, communication preferences, and GDPR-oriented requests from one secure customer area. Aurevia Travel provides a service workflow, not legal advice or a government filing channel.
privacy.cookieBody: Necessary cookies stay on for secure account behavior. Optional categories can be reviewed and updated here at any time.

cookies.necessaryBody: Required for authentication, navigation safety, and core booking continuity.
cookies.analyticsBody: Optional measurement cookies that help us understand product quality and usage.
cookies.marketingBody: Optional cookies for campaign attribution and future marketing effectiveness.

privacy.communicationsBody: These settings help us respect how you want to hear from Aurevia and whether personalization signals can be used in future service design.

communications.marketingBody: Allow launch updates, curated offers, and future travel communications by email.
communications.profilingBody: Allow limited preference profiling so future recommendations can be better aligned to your travel interests.

privacy.saveSuccessDescription: Your privacy choices were recorded successfully.
privacy.saveErrorDescription: Please try updating your privacy choices again.
privacy.requestsBody: You can request an export of your account data or ask us to review a deletion request. Some records may need to be retained for finance, fraud, VAT, or operational obligations and should be reviewed before deletion.
privacy.requestSuccessDescription: Your request is now in the review queue.
privacy.requestErrorDescription: Please try again or contact support if the issue continues.

requestValidation.detailsTooLong: Keep the request details within 1000 characters.

privacy.requestHistoryBody: Track the latest status of privacy-related requests made from your account.
privacy.emptyBody: Submit a data export or deletion request here when you need one.
privacy.legalBody: These links open the currently published legal pages for this locale. If managed database content is not available, Aurevia falls back to product placeholders until reviewed legal copy is published.
privacy.reviewNotice: Deletion execution, retention decisions, and final legal language still require legal and accounting review before production launch.

shell.title: Aurevia operations for {name}
shell.body: Oversee bookings, customer records, visa-service workflows, finance visibility, and managed content from a protected staff surface with server-side role checks.
shell.securityNotice: This area is restricted to Aurevia staff roles and all sensitive mutations run through protected server code.
shell.forbiddenTitle: You don't have access to this section.
shell.forbiddenBody: Your admin account is signed in, but this area needs a higher level of permission. Contact your administrator if you need access.

metrics.totalBookingsBody: All booking records across active customer journeys and historical itineraries.
metrics.revenueBody: Captured payment volume across paid bookings and issued invoices.
metrics.visaCasesBody: Visa applications still moving through submission, review, or action-required states.

dashboard.recentActivityEmpty: No recent operational activity is available yet.
dashboard.summaryBody: This panel is designed for staff oversight, not public customer use. It keeps operational changes server-side and prepares the platform for auditable day-to-day management.

summaryPoints.roles: Role-aware navigation keeps support, admin, and owner responsibilities separated.
summaryPoints.audit: Sensitive mutations are recorded to audit logs for later investigation.
summaryPoints.content: Core catalog, legal, and homepage content tables can be managed without touching application code.
summaryPoints.visibility: Booking, payment, refund, visa, and support context stays connected in one staff workspace.

overview.title: Overview
overview.description: Track core demand, payment, and visa-service signals before drilling into operational records and managed content.

bookings.title: Booking oversight
bookings.description: Search the full booking ledger, review payment state, and inspect immutable booking snapshots with staff-only context.
bookings.emptyBody: Try widening the search or clearing the filters to review more booking activity.

bookingDetail.description: Review the booking snapshot, payments, refunds, support context, internal notes, and recent audit activity in one place.
bookingDetail.adminNotesEmpty: No internal notes have been added to this booking yet.
bookingDetail.travelersEmpty: No traveler snapshots were attached to this booking.
bookingDetail.supportTicketsEmpty: No support tickets are linked to this booking.
bookingDetail.auditEmpty: No audit records are attached to this booking yet.

customers.title: Customers
customers.description: Review customer profiles, booking load, visa activity, and role assignments from a single staff list.
customers.emptyBody: Try broadening the search to review more customer accounts.

visaReview.title: Visa review queue
visaReview.description: Monitor application status, upload readiness, and next staff actions for private visa-service workflows.
visaReview.emptyTitle: No visa applications match these filters
visaReview.emptyBody: Try another search or status combination to expand the queue.

support.title: Support tickets
support.description: Review customer support load, ticket priority, assignment, and resolution progress from the same operational surface.
support.searchPlaceholder: Ticket number, subject, customer name, or email
support.emptyTitle: No support tickets match these filters
support.emptyBody: Try broadening the search or clearing the current support filters.

privacy.title: Privacy operations
privacy.description: Review data export and deletion requests, assign follow-up ownership, and keep retention-sensitive decisions in a staff-only operational queue.
privacy.emptyTitle: No privacy requests match these filters
privacy.emptyBody: Try broadening the search or clearing filters to review more privacy operations.

retentionFlags.finance_retention_required: Finance records may need to be retained for VAT, accounting, fraud, or chargeback obligations.
retentionFlags.snapshot_anonymization_preferred: Confirmed bookings and invoice-linked records should usually be anonymized rather than hard-deleted.
retentionFlags.open_case_hold: Open support, visa, or payment disputes should pause deletion execution until operational review is complete.
retentionFlags.upload_review_required: Private uploads should be reviewed against open case handling and statutory retention requirements before removal.

notes.bodyPlaceholder: Capture booking context, next actions, or customer care instructions.
notes.visibleToCustomerLabel: Allow the customer to see this note in a future customer-facing support view.
notes.saveSuccessDescription: The booking note was added successfully.
notes.saveErrorDescription: Please try saving the note again.

form.saveSuccessDescription: The visa review status was saved successfully.
form.saveErrorDescription: Please retry the visa review update.
form.emailHelper: Applicants are notified automatically whenever you change the application status.

form.saveSuccessDescription: The support ticket was updated successfully.
form.saveErrorDescription: Please retry the support ticket update.

destinations.title: Destinations
destinations.description: Manage destination cards and structured geography used across marketing and booking journeys.
destinations.emptyBody: Create destination records to shape homepage discovery and travel context.

airports.title: Airports
airports.description: Manage airport reference data for search, routing, and booking snapshot integrity.
airports.emptyBody: Create airport records to support richer flight and transfer operations.

airlines.title: Airlines
airlines.description: Manage airline reference records used in provider normalization and booking display.
airlines.emptyBody: Create airline records to prepare richer flight supplier mapping.

featuredContent.title: Featured homepage content
featuredContent.description: Manage localized editorial cards and homepage highlights without editing code.
featuredContent.emptyBody: Create localized homepage content blocks for destination and inspiration sections.

legal.title: Legal documents
legal.description: Version and publish legal content with locale, status, and effective-date control.
legal.emptyBody: Create legal document records for privacy, terms, cookies, and refund policies.

visaProducts.title: Visa products
visaProducts.description: Manage destination-based visa-service offerings, timelines, and requirement messaging.
visaProducts.emptyBody: Create visa-service products so destination-based application flows can grow from managed data.

suppliers.title: Suppliers
suppliers.description: Manage provider metadata, supported service types, and future integration configuration shells.
suppliers.emptyBody: Create supplier records to track provider readiness across bookings.

coupons.title: Coupons
coupons.description: Manage fixed-amount and percentage discount codes with booking-type scope and redemption rules.
coupons.emptyBody: Create coupons to support controlled promotional and concierge discounting.

settings.title: Site settings
settings.description: Manage global and locale-specific settings values that drive controlled platform behavior.
settings.emptyBody: Create managed settings when a platform behavior should move out of code and into operations.

form.saveSuccessDescription: The request review state was saved successfully.
form.saveErrorDescription: Please retry the privacy request update.

statusMessages.approved: Your application is ready for the next Aurevia handoff.
statusMessages.rejected: This application was declined during review.
statusMessages.needs_changes: More information or corrected documents are needed before we can continue.

documentDescriptions.passport_scan: Upload the passport bio-data page in clear color.
documentDescriptions.photograph: Upload a recent passport-style photograph that matches embassy rules.
documentDescriptions.travel_itinerary: Share your draft flights or route plan for this journey.
documentDescriptions.accommodation_proof: Provide hotel confirmations or host accommodation details.
documentDescriptions.financial_proof: Upload recent bank statements or other funding proof.
documentDescriptions.travel_insurance: Upload valid travel medical insurance for the trip dates.
documentDescriptions.residency_permit: Include this if you live outside your passport country.
documentDescriptions.employment_letter: Provide employer confirmation when it supports the application.
documentDescriptions.invitation_letter: Upload an invitation letter if the trip is hosted.
documentDescriptions.dependent_consent: Upload guardian consent when minors or dependents are included.

uploads.errorFallback: Unable to upload the visa document.
uploads.supportedFormats: Accepted file types vary by document and include PDF, JPG, and PNG.

application.title: Visa application wizard
application.travelBody: Confirm the destination, dates, and travel purpose so we can keep the application aligned to the correct visa workflow.
application.purposeDetailsPlaceholder: Add any supporting context that may help the review team.
application.identityBody: Enter the traveler details exactly as they appear on the passport you will use for this trip.
application.residencyBody: Tell us where the applicant currently lives and what residency basis applies there.
application.companionsBody: Add companions only when their travel relationship matters to the visa file.
application.documentsBody: Upload the required files so the application can move from draft into formal review.
application.privacyCopy: Uploads stay tied to your secured Aurevia account and are shared only within the visa-support workflow.
application.reviewBody: Check the summary below, confirm the service acknowledgements, and submit when everything is complete.
application.documentsReady: All required documents are in place.
application.serviceScopeLabel: I understand Aurevia coordinates visa support and document preparation.
application.serviceScopeBody: Final issuance decisions remain with the embassy, consulate, or appointed visa center.
application.accuracyLabel: I confirm the information provided is accurate.
application.accuracyBody: I understand incorrect or incomplete information may delay or affect the outcome of the application.
application.draftSavedDescription: Your visa application draft was saved successfully.
application.submitSuccessDescription: Your visa application was submitted with reference {reference}.
application.documentsMissingDescription: Upload all required files before moving to the final review step.
application.notLegalAdviceCopy: Aurevia provides coordination and guidance. Visa approval remains at the discretion of the issuing authority.

validation.companionDateRequired: Enter the companion's date of birth.
validation.dateOfBirthRequired: Enter the applicant's date of birth.
validation.departureAfterArrival: The departure date must be on or after the arrival date.
validation.passportExpiryAfterDeparture: The passport expiry date must be after the intended departure date.
validation.passportIssuedBeforeExpiry: The passport issue date must be before the expiry date.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This page reserves the privacy policy surface for GDPR-aware customer flows.
privacy.body: The production policy should explain controller details, processing purposes, lawful bases, retention, processors, international transfers, data subject rights, and contact channels.
privacy.reviewNotice: Legal copy must be reviewed by qualified counsel before launch.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.intro: This page reserves the terms surface for customer and platform usage rules.
terms.body: The production terms should cover account obligations, booking conditions, supplier roles, payment terms, acceptable use, liability limits, jurisdiction, and service availability.
terms.reviewNotice: Legal copy must be reviewed by qualified counsel before launch.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.intro: This page reserves the cookie policy surface and links to the consent mechanism.
cookies.body: The production policy should list essential and optional cookies, purposes, durations, providers, consent choices, and withdrawal options.
cookies.reviewNotice: Legal copy must be reviewed by qualified counsel before launch.

refunds.title: Refund Policy
refunds.intro: This page reserves the refund policy surface for booking-specific cancellation and refund rules.
refunds.body: The production policy should distinguish supplier terms, platform fees, cooling-off exceptions, refund timing, chargebacks, and non-refundable services.
refunds.reviewNotice: Legal and tax treatment must be reviewed before launch.

Errors.notFoundDescription: The page you requested is unavailable or has moved.
Errors.errorDescription: Please retry the action. If the issue continues, support can investigate with the error reference.
